title: Extra Select Marrowbone Rolls Dog Treat - Crunchy Biscuits & Snacks with Meaty Center - Marrow Bone Puppy Treats & Bedtime Biscuits for Dogs - 1 Litre Resealable Tub
features: Your dog will love the crunchy texture of these marrowbone dog biscuits treats making them ideal as puppy training treats.
From small dog biscuits for tiny pups to large dog treats for big dogs, these marrowbone dog biscuits are bite-sized and suitable for all.
These tasty minis dog treats feature a rich, meaty marrow bone wrapped in a crunchy biscuit - perfect as dog treats for large dogs and small breeds alike.
These mini dog treats are perfect as puppy biscuits, dog bedtime biscuits, small dog treats for training, or simply as a delicious treat.
These dog biscuits small dog breeds & large love come in a handy tub that's perfect for keeping hungry pets satisfied with fresh mini dog biscuits.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Marrowbone Rolls How to Feed? These mini rolls are suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age and serve as an excellent snack or training reward. To ensure a balanced diet, adjust your dog's meal portions accordingly. Always provide fresh drinking water and store the treats in a cool, dry place for maximum freshness. Nutrition Crude Protein 10.6%, Crude Fat 5.5%, Crude Ash 3.5%, Crude Fibre 1.0%, Sodium 0.5% Cereals, Glucose 9.4%, Palm Oil, Chicken Meal, Minerals Tips for Treats Supervised Snacking: Watch your dog while they enjoy their Gravy Bones. Balanced Diet: Remember, treats should only be a small part of a balanced diet. Age Appropriate: Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks old. Meaty Minis Each Marrowbone Roll is a crunchy bite packed with flavour. They're just the right size to be a high value training treat, or just as a snack to brighten their day, and their low-fat content makes them easy to fit in a balanced diet. Nutritionally Valuable With a good balance of crude protein and fats, our marrowbone rolls contribute to your dog's daily nutrient intake. They contain 9.4% protein, complemented by a 5.5% fat content for satiety and coat health. Convenient Training Aid These marrowbone rolls are more than just a tasty treat; they also serve as a helpful training aid. The convenient shape makes them easy to carry and dispense, making your training sessions as smooth as possible.
